mgmd.multicast-vpn: ${vpn\-name} proxy ${vpn\-profile\-name} ipv4 <#if user\-side\-proxy\-ipv4\-address?has_content> ${user\-side\-proxy\-ipv4\-address} </#if> <#if unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing?has_content> <#if unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'discard'> unmatched-mgmd-report-discard <#elseif unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'forward'> unmatched-mgmd-report-forward <#elseif unmatched\-membership\-report\-processing == 'snoop-or-proxy'> unmatched-mgmd-report-snoop-or-proxy </#if> <#else> unmatched-mgmd-report-discard </#if> <#if network\-interface\-for\-unmatched\-reports?has_content> ${network\-interface\-for\-unmatched\-reports} </#if> <#if channel\-rate\-for\-unmatched\-multicast\-channel?has_content> ${channel\-rate\-for\-unmatched\-multicast\-channel} </#if>
